'''gahazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:feat|feat]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-h-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:feat|feat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gahazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæhæzhæth|gæhæzhæth]] || [[word:gæhæzhæj|gæhæzhæj]] || [[word:gæhæzhæsh|gæhæzhæsh]] || [[word:gæhæzhæ|gæhæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gahahazhath|gahahazhath]] || [[word:gahahazhaj|gahahazhaj]] || [[word:gahahazhash|gahahazhash]] || [[word:gahahazha|gahahazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gahazhath|gahazhath]] || [[word:gahazhaj|gahazhaj]] || [[word:gahazhash|gahazhash]] || [[word:gahazha|gahazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gahafzhath|gahafzhath]] || [[word:gahafzhaj|gahafzhaj]] || [[word:gahafzhash|gahafzhash]] || [[word:gahafzhaf|gahafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gahazhatha|gahazhatha]] || [[word:gahazhaja|gahazhaja]] || [[word:gahazhasha|gahazhasha]] || [[word:gahazhaka|gahazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gahazhath|gahazhath]] || [[word:gahazhaj|gahazhaj]] || [[word:gahazhash|gahazhash]] || [[word:gahazha|gahazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gahazhathal|gahazhathal]] || [[word:gahazhajal|gahazhajal]] || [[word:gahazhashal|gahazhashal]] || [[word:gahazhakal|gahazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gahazhathatha|gahazhathatha]] || [[word:gahazhajaja|gahazhajaja]] || [[word:gahazhashasha|gahazhashasha]] || [[word:gahazhaka|gahazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gahazhathan|gahazhathan]] || [[word:gahazhajan|gahazhajan]] || [[word:gahazhashan|gahazhashan]] || [[word:gahazhakan|gahazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gahazhathaoro|gahazhathaoro]] || [[word:gahazhajaoro|gahazhajaoro]] || [[word:gahazhashaoro|gahazhashaoro]] || [[word:gahazhakaoro|gahazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
